# XCSourceEditorCommandInvocation

**Class**

An object that identifies the command issued to your extension and provides the contents of the active source editor.

## Declaration

```swift
class XCSourceEditorCommandInvocation
```

## Responding to Commands

- **buffer**: The buffer of source text upon which the command can operate.
- **commandIdentifier**: The identifier of the command that the user invoked.

## Responding to Cancelled Commands

- **cancellationHandler**: A handler to be invoked by Xcode to indicate that the invocation has been canceled by the user.

## Editor Commands

- **XCSourceEditorCommand**: The protocol you implement to handle command invocations in a source editor extension.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
